metadata.description: M1 deterministic descending-root ladder with four arrivals
metadata.name: root-ratchet-12

assertion_results.message: all active nodes advertise the minimum active address
every ancestry contains unique stable node IDs
no active node retains a superseded root at quiescence
every transmitted per-peer announcement obeys the configured boundary
parent, root, and ancestry columns agree
all transmitted bytes are delivered or deterministically lost
requested, coalesced, cancelled, constructed, serialized, queued, and rejected totals reconcile
per-edge transmitted bytes equal delivered plus lost bytes
event order is a stable virtual-time and ordinal total order

assertions.message: all active nodes advertise the minimum active address
every ancestry contains unique stable node IDs
no active node retains a superseded root at quiescence
every transmitted per-peer announcement obeys the configured boundary
parent, root, and ancestry columns agree
all transmitted bytes are delivered or deterministically lost
requested, coalesced, cancelled, constructed, serialized, queued, and rejected totals reconcile
per-edge transmitted bytes equal delivered plus lost bytes
event order is a stable virtual-time and ordinal total order

samples.fidelity_statement: Wire evidence uses executable production codec; protocol fidelity is individually modeled semantic state; compute fidelity is operation-counted compute; scale uses individual nodes across 12 represented nodes; Bloom fidelity uses exact Bloom bits. No approximation metadata applies.
